concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive explanatory details about advisor Viktor Prasanna's controlling motivations regarding internships and collaboration, reducing specific behavioral observations to generic labels without context
concerns.excerpt: 本质上你实习意味着你有能力脱离他的掌控

concerns.detail: Addition attributes unsupported psychological motive (jealousy) to professors to explain discriminatory behavior, constituting an unsupported character judgment
